titles.title: Wonderful, Wonderful, Jesus Is to Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Wonderful, wonderful, Jesus is to me, Counsellor, mighty God, Prince Of Peace, is He; Saving Me, keeping me from all sin and shame, Wonderful is my Redeemer, praise His Name!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I once was lost, now I’m found I'm free from condemnation Jesus gives liberty and a full salvation; Saving me, keeping me from All sin and shame Wonderful is my redeemer, praise His name!
